name: a produced design with the attached full-surface grounding is complete against the full surface (needs_grounding=0)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --emit-grounding 2>/dev/null > g.json; printf '%s' '{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"c","source_id":"owasp-asvs","grounding":"grounded"}]}}' > d.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json --grounding g.json --require-complete 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'needs_grounding=0 iac_rules=22 enforcement=skipped status=complete' e.txt && echo design-complete 1>&2
